entity.summary: GalaChain decentralized exchange service providing API-driven token swap creation and acceptance, market-rate comparison, liquidity offering, and wallet-based trading workflows.
entity.notes: The official GalaChain organization publishes a GalaSwap trading-bot implementation that directly identifies GalaSwap as an exchange, documents GalaSwap API use, swap acceptance and creation, market-rate comparison, liquidity offering, wallet authentication, and live GalaSwap API links. Duplicate Gala Swap discovery rows are consolidated into one entity.

evidence.title: GalaSwap Trading Bot
evidence.notes: Official GalaChain repository identifies GalaSwap as an exchange and documents API-driven trading strategies that accept swaps, create swaps, offer liquidity, compare market rates, manage trading pairs, and use GalaChain wallet credentials.

evidence.title: GalaSwap API documentation
evidence.notes: First-party GalaSwap API endpoint is referenced directly by the official GalaChain trading-bot implementation for wallet keys and GalaSwap API interaction.

evidence.title: Gala Swap DEX discovery entries
evidence.notes: June 2026 DEX candidate corpus identifies Gala Swap in the DEX category and provides current registry corroboration; duplicate source rows are consolidated under one entity.
